queries.query:
-- Using the CREATE statement
CREATE IC_directory:{username: 'johndoe',full_name: 'John Doe'} CONTENT {
	username: 'johndoe',
	full_name: 'John Doe',
	email: 'johndoe@example.com',
	date_of_birth: "1990-01-01",
	join_date: "2024-05-30",
	department: 'Engineering',
	role: 'Software Engineer',
	skills: ['Python', 'JavaScript', 'surql'],
	manager: manager_directory:janesmith,
	tags: ['full-time', 'remote']
};

-- Using the UPDATE statement
CREATE manager_directory:janesmith CONTENT {
	username: 'janesmith',
	full_name: 'Jane Smith',
	email: 'janesmith@example.com',
	date_of_birth: "1985-01-01",
	join_date: "2019-05-30",
	department: 'Engineering',
    role: 'Software Engineer Manager',
	skills: ['Python', 'JavaScript', 'surql'],
	report: IC_directory:{ full_name: 'John Doe', username: 'johndoe' },
	tags: ['full-time', 'remote']
};

select * from manager_directory;

SELECT *
    OMIT boring_data,
    who_cares,
    uninteresting_data
FROM {
    name: "Aeon",
    age: 20,
    town: "Toria",
    boring_data: true,
    who_cares: 888.9,
    uninteresting_data: "Bunch of data"
};

queries.query:
DEFINE FUNCTION fn::divide($one: number, $two: number) -> number {
    IF $two == 0 {
        THROW "Can't divide by zero, you should know that by now";
    };
    RETURN $one / $two;
};

RETURN fn::divide(100, 0);
RETURN fn::divide(100, 10);

DEFINE FUNCTION OVERWRITE fn::add_trip($from: string, $to: string, $crookedness: string, $terrain: string, $slope: string) -> string {
    IF $crookedness NOT IN ["straight", "crooked", "very crooked"] {
    THROW "Third argument is crookedness: straight, crooked, or very crooked";
    };
    IF $terrain NOT IN ["road", "normal", "land", "water"] {
        THROW "Fourth argument is terrain: road, normal, land, or water";
    };
    IF $slope NOT IN ["flat", "up", "down", "steep"] {
      THROW "Fifth argument is slope: flat, up, down, or steep";
    };
    LET $begin = (SELECT * FROM ONLY town WHERE name = $from LIMIT 1);
    LET $end =   (SELECT * FROM ONLY town WHERE name = $to LIMIT 1);

    IF count($begin) = 0 {
        THROW "Could not find town " + $from + " in the database"
    };

    IF count($end) = 0 {
        THROW "Could not find town " + $to + " in the database"
    };

    LET $relation = RELATE $begin->to->$end
        SET
        crookedness = $crookedness,
        terrain = $terrain,
        slope = $slope,
        distance = geo::distance($begin.location, $end.location),
        speed_modifier =
            (IF     crookedness = "straight"     { 1.0 }
            ELSE IF crookedness = "crooked"      { 0.8 }
            ELSE IF crookedness = "very crooked" { 0.5 })
            *
            (IF     slope = "flat"               { 1.0 }
            ELSE IF slope = "up"                 { 0.8 }
            ELSE IF slope = "down"               { 1.2 }
            ELSE IF slope = "steep"              { 0.5 })
            *
            (IF terrain = "road"                 { 1.2 }
            ELSE IF terrain = "normal"           { 1.0 }
            ELSE IF terrain = "hard"             { 0.7 }
            ELSE IF terrain = "water"            { 1.0 }),
        days_travel =
            IF $trip.terrain = "water" { 1 + (distance / 100000 * speed_modifier) }
            ELSE                       {      distance / 20000  * speed_modifier  };
	RETURN <string>$relation.in.name + " to " + <string>$relation.out.name + " trip created!";
};

fn::add_trip("one", "two", "three", "four", "five");

INFO F
CREATE town SET name = "one", location = (-123.338, 48.481);
CREATE town SET name = "two", location = (-123.4, 48.5);
fn::add_trip("one", "two", "straight", "road", "down");
fn::add_trip("two", "one", "straight", "road", "up");
SELECT * OMIT id, in, out FROM to WHERE in.name = 'one' OR out.name = 'one';


fn::add_trip("The Hill", "Toria", "straight", "road", "down");

SELECT 
	bearing,
	crookedness,
	days_travel,
	distance,
	slope,
	terrain
FROM to
WHERE
	in.name = "The Hill" AND
	out.name = "Toria";


SELECT
	->to->town.name AS next_routes
	FROM town
	WHERE name = 'The Hill';

RETURN [8,9,0][0];
RETURN [8,9,0][WHERE $this != 9];

RETURN
	[1,2,3,4,5,6,7,8,9,0]
	[WHERE $this != 2]
	[WHERE $this != 4]
	[WHERE $this % 2 = 0];


RETURN [
	{
		name: 'Toria',
		temperature: 10.0
	},
	{
		name: 'The Hill',
		temperature: 12.5
	}
][WHERE temperature > 10.0];

SELECT
	->to->town[WHERE name = 'Toria']
	->to->town.name
FROM town
WHERE name = 'The Hill';

	->to->town[WHERE name = 'Toria']
	-- ->to->town[WHERE name = 'Black Bay']
	-- ->to->town[WHERE name = 'Gaston']
	-- ->to->town[WHERE name = 'Abeston']
	-- ->to->town[WHERE name = 'Hope'].* AS town_info
FROM town
WHERE name = 'The Hill';

SELECT * FROM town WHERE name = "Hope" ;

LET $split = |$record: record| [$record.tb(), $record.id()];

$split(town:pjnrbg2htfwfu3nedu1n);

SELECT ->parent_of->person->parent_of->person.name FROM person;

CREATE city:kago;

INFO FOR DB;

RELATE person:bertha ->city->person:the_nobleman SET name = "Nice City";
DELETE FROM city:vv264ws6o781znktmpnp;

SELECT * FROM city;

CREATE weather SET temperature = 10.0, location = city:toria;
CREATE weather SET temperature = 15.0, location = city:toria;
SELECT * from weather;

DEFINE TABLE weather_data AS SELECT * FROM weather;

INSERT INTO weather (location, temperature) VALUES
    (city:toria, 10.0), (city:toria, 15.0),
    (city:sukh, 9.5), (city:sukh, 10.1),
    (city:redmont, 16.0);

SELECT * FROM weather_data;

DEFINE USER nsuser ON NAMESPACE PASSWORD '123456' ROLES EDITOR DURATION FOR SESSION 12h, FOR TOKEN 1m;
DEFINE USER dbuser ON DATABASE PASSWORD '123456' ROLES VIEWER DURATION FOR SESSION 5d, FOR TOKEN 2h;

DEFINE USER OVERWRITE nsuser ON NAMESPACE PASSWORD '123456' ROLES EDITOR;
DEFINE USER OVERWRITE dbuser ON DATABASE PASSWORD '123456' ROLES VIEWER;
